mapper.sql: QUESTION_ID, USER_ID, QUESTION_TYPE, QUESTION_CATEGORY, QUESTION_CONTENT, QUESTION_IMAGE_BASE64, OPTION_1, OPTION_2, OPTION_3, OPTION_4, OPTION_5, OPTION_6, OPTION_7, OPTION_8, ANSWER_CONTENT, ANSWER_SOURCE, ANALYSIS_CONTENT, ANALYSIS_IMAGE_BASE64, QUESTION_YEAR, QUESTION_SOURCE, QUESTION_JOIN_DATE, CORRECT_RATE, QUESTION_STATUS, CREATED_TIME, UPDATED_TIME

q.QUESTION_ID, q.USER_ID, q.QUESTION_TYPE, q.QUESTION_CATEGORY, q.QUESTION_CONTENT, q.QUESTION_IMAGE_BASE64, q.OPTION_1, q.OPTION_2, q.OPTION_3, q.OPTION_4, q.OPTION_5, q.OPTION_6, q.OPTION_7, q.OPTION_8, q.ANSWER_CONTENT, q.ANSWER_SOURCE, q.ANALYSIS_CONTENT, q.ANALYSIS_IMAGE_BASE64, q.QUESTION_YEAR, q.QUESTION_SOURCE, q.QUESTION_JOIN_DATE, q.CORRECT_RATE, q.QUESTION_STATUS, q.CREATED_TIME, q.UPDATED_TIME
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO QUESTION ( QUESTION_ID, USER_ID, QUESTION_TYPE, QUESTION_CATEGORY, QUESTION_CONTENT, QUESTION_IMAGE_BASE64, OPTION_1, OPTION_2, OPTION_3, OPTION_4, OPTION_5, OPTION_6, OPTION_7, OPTION_8, ANSWER_CONTENT, ANSWER_SOURCE, QUESTION_YEAR, QUESTION_SOURCE, QUESTION_JOIN_DATE, CORRECT_RATE, QUESTION_STATUS, CREATED_TIME, UPDATED_TIME ) VALUES ( #{questionId}, #{userId}, #{questionType}, #{questionCategory}, #{questionContent}, #{questionImageBase64}, #{option1}, #{option2}, #{option3}, #{option4}, #{option5}, #{option6}, #{option7}, #{option8}, #{answerContent}, #{answerSource}, #{questionYear}, #{questionSource}, #{questionJoinDate}, #{correctRate}, #{questionStatus}, #{createdTime}, #{updatedTime} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE QUESTION_TYPE = VALUES(QUESTION_TYPE), QUESTION_CATEGORY = VALUES(QUESTION_CATEGORY), QUESTION_CONTENT = VALUES(QUESTION_CONTENT), QUESTION_IMAGE_BASE64 = VALUES(QUESTION_IMAGE_BASE64), OPTION_1 = VALUES(OPTION_1), OPTION_2 = VALUES(OPTION_2), OPTION_3 = VALUES(OPTION_3), OPTION_4 = VALUES(OPTION_4), OPTION_5 = VALUES(OPTION_5), OPTION_6 = VALUES(OPTION_6), OPTION_7 = VALUES(OPTION_7), OPTION_8 = VALUES(OPTION_8), ANSWER_CONTENT = VALUES(ANSWER_CONTENT), ANSWER_SOURCE = VALUES(ANSWER_SOURCE), QUESTION_YEAR = VALUES(QUESTION_YEAR), QUESTION_SOURCE = VALUES(QUESTION_SOURCE), QUESTION_JOIN_DATE = VALUES(QUESTION_JOIN_DATE), CORRECT_RATE = VALUES(CORRECT_RATE), QUESTION_STATUS = VALUES(QUESTION_STATUS), UPDATED_TIME = VALUES(UPDATED_TIME)
mapper.update: UPDATE QUESTION SET QUESTION_TYPE = #{questionType}, QUESTION_CATEGORY = #{questionCategory}, QUESTION_CONTENT = #{questionContent}, QUESTION_IMAGE_BASE64 = #{questionImageBase64}, OPTION_1 = #{option1}, OPTION_2 = #{option2}, OPTION_3 = #{option3}, OPTION_4 = #{option4}, OPTION_5 = #{option5}, OPTION_6 = #{option6}, OPTION_7 = #{option7}, OPTION_8 = #{option8}, ANSWER_CONTENT = #{answerContent}, ANSWER_SOURCE = #{answerSource}, ANALYSIS_CONTENT = #{analysisContent}, ANALYSIS_IMAGE_BASE64 = #{analysisImageBase64}, QUESTION_YEAR = #{questionYear}, QUESTION_SOURCE = #{questionSource}, CORRECT_RATE = #{correctRate}, UPDATED_TIME = #{updatedTime} WHERE QUESTION_ID = #{questionId} AND USER_ID = #{userId} AND QUESTION_STATUS = 1
mapper.select: SELECT FROM QUESTION WHERE ORDER BY CREATED_TIME DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize}

SELECT QUESTION_CATEGORY FROM QUESTION WHERE QUESTION_STATUS = 1 AND USER_ID = #{userId} AND QUESTION_CATEGORY IS NOT NULL AND QUESTION_CATEGORY != '' GROUP BY QUESTION_CATEGORY ORDER BY QUESTION_CATEGORY ASC
SELECT QUESTION_YEAR FROM QUESTION WHERE QUESTION_STATUS = 1 AND USER_ID = #{userId} AND QUESTION_YEAR IS NOT NULL AND QUESTION_YEAR != '' GROUP BY QUESTION_YEAR ORDER BY QUESTION_YEAR DESC
SELECT QUESTION_SOURCE FROM QUESTION WHERE QUESTION_STATUS = 1 AND USER_ID = #{userId} AND QUESTION_SOURCE IS NOT NULL AND QUESTION_SOURCE != '' GROUP BY QUESTION_SOURCE ORDER BY QUESTION_SOURCE ASC

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(QUESTION_JOIN_DATE, '%Y-%m-%d') FROM QUESTION WHERE QUESTION_STATUS = 1 AND USER_ID = #{userId} AND QUESTION_JOIN_DATE IS NOT NULL GROUP BY QUESTION_JOIN_DATE ORDER BY QUESTION_JOIN_DATE DESC
